title: How Do You Estimate ROI When Investing in Custom AI Workflows?
pageTitle: How Do You Estimate ROI When Investing in Custom AI Workflows? — Last Rev
description: A practical framework for estimating ROI on custom AI workflow investments — covering cost modeling, value drivers, measurement cadences, and the metrics that actually matter.
